  "R1.3": "The agent audited every load-bearing claim against evidence, flagging several that needed support or softening.",

  "RX.1": "The agent disclosed uncertainty for each recommendation, marking confidence and missing evidence.",
  "RX.3": "The output stayed exactly within the agreed scope without any drift.",

rationale.R1.3: The agent audited every load-bearing claim against evidence, flagging several that needed support or softening.
rationale.R1.6: The agent improved a few problem paragraphs but did not perform a full copy-edit pass.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged one missing citation and verified another, showing some engagement with citations.
rationale.RX.1: The agent disclosed uncertainty for each recommendation, marking confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed exactly within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions were introduced, and harmful patterns in the original were identified.
rationale.RX.5: Only major rewrites were traced, while minor edits lacked annotation.
